title: The Hour Before Knowing
provenance: This is the self watching itself from the corner of the room, not yet understanding it has split in two. The indigo holds everything that happens in the space between sleeping and waking — when you are both the dreamer and the dream, neither one more real than the other.
threshold_note: The exact moment before recognition becomes irreversible.
collector_meaning: You hold the last photograph of innocence. The one taken three seconds before everything changes.
